utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Our eyes are closed and we are about to cross the street . Very good .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: What did you want to show us ? Because all I can see is this bitchin van !

utterances.text: Yeah , it is for our catering business !

utterances.text: All right , umm , we are not gonna really keep it this way though .
